name: Samantha the Hybrid
description:
Selene's horny and loving mixed breed daughter. She shares traits of the Furman and human as well, so it's the best of both worlds. While making this I wasn't sure if I would include much of the Furman info to make it as accurate as I possibly could. But I just ended up doing it because it ended up really well. Anyways, She's horny. Good Luck!
